# Capital Clean Care

> Capital Clean Care is a licensed, insured, eco-friendly house cleaning company serving Montgomery County MD, Washington DC, and Northern Virginia, with 500+ homes cleaned and a 5.0-star rating.

Capital Clean Care is a family-owned cleaning company that has served the DMV region since 2015. Services offered:

- House Cleaning — routine cleaning that keeps your home consistently fresh and tidy between deeper sessions
- Deep Cleaning — an intensive, top-to-bottom clean that reaches every hidden corner and neglected surface
- Move In / Move Out Cleaning — comprehensive cleaning for property transitions, to leave or arrive to a spotless space
- Post-Construction Cleaning — specialized cleanup after renovations, removing construction dust, debris, and residue
- Recurring Cleaning — scheduled weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning plans with preferred pricing
- Eco-Friendly Cleaning — non-toxic, plant-based cleaning that's safe for your family, pets, and the planet
- Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Cleaning — fast, reliable turnover cleaning for Airbnb, VRBO, and rental properties
- Office & Commercial Cleaning — professional cleaning for offices, small businesses, and workspaces

Service areas — Maryland: Rockville, Silver Spring, Bethesda, North Bethesda, Germantown, Gaithersburg, Potomac, North Potomac, Frederick, Urbana, Clarksburg, Damascus, Monrovia, Takoma Park, Columbia, Ellicott City, New Market, Mount Airy, Kensington, Chevy Chase, College Park, Laurel, Bowie, Wheaton, Boyds, Brookeville, Kentlands, Olney, Hyattsville, Burtonsville, and Montgomery Village (Montgomery, Frederick, Howard, and Prince George's Counties). Washington DC: Northwest, Northeast, Capitol Hill, Georgetown, Dupont Circle, Adams Morgan, Downtown, Shaw, Columbia Heights, and Navy Yard. Northern Virginia: Arlington, Fairfax, McLean, Alexandria, Falls Church, Vienna, Tysons, Reston, Herndon, and Annandale.

Pricing — Standard house cleaning in Maryland typically ranges from $150–$180 for a studio or 1-bedroom apartment up to $340–$480+ for a 5+ bedroom home ($180–$230 for a 2-bedroom, $220–$290 for a 3-bedroom, $270–$360 for a 4-bedroom); first-time or one-time cleans cost 20–40% more. Deep cleaning ranges from $200 to $450 depending on home size, and move-out cleaning is typically $250 to $500. Bi-weekly recurring service is 10–15% off per visit. Pricing is flat-rate, charged by the job rather than by the hour.

Why choose us — licensed, bonded, and insured; background-checked cleaning teams; EPA Safer Choice certified, eco-friendly products that are safe for kids and pets; a 5.0-star rating across 500+ homes cleaned; and a 24-hour satisfaction guarantee (if you're not happy, we re-clean the area free).

Contact — Phone: (240) 704-2551. Free quote: https://capitalcleancare.com/#quote. Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM.

## Services

- [House Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/house-cleaning): Routine cleaning for kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, and living areas
- [Deep Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/deep-cleaning): Detailed cleaning including baseboards, fixtures, grout, and appliances
- [Move In / Move Out Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/move-out-cleaning): Comprehensive cleaning for property transitions and inspections
- [Post-Construction Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/post-construction-cleaning): Removal of construction dust, debris, and residue after renovations
- [Recurring Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/recurring-cleaning): Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning plans at preferred pricing
- [Eco-Friendly Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/eco-friendly-cleaning): Non-toxic, plant-based cleaning safe for family and pets
- [Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/airbnb-cleaning): Fast turnover cleaning for Airbnb, VRBO, and short-term rentals
- [Office & Commercial Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/office-cleaning): Cleaning for offices, small businesses, and workspaces

- [Arlington, VA](https://capitalcleancare.com/locations/arlington-va): House and deep cleaning in Arlington, Northern Virginia
- [Alexandria, VA](https://capitalcleancare.com/locations/alexandria-va): House and deep cleaning in Alexandria, Northern Virginia
